data.description: Region of the celestial sphere mainly located north of the celestial equator.
data.usage_note: Used as descriptive astronomy metadata for constellations or stars.

data.description: Region of the celestial sphere mainly located south of the celestial equator.

data.description: Region close to the celestial equator, generally visible from both terrestrial hemispheres.
